close_reason: All child tasks are closed and landed on feat/more-om.
description:
Practical backlog summary anchor: **Tier 1 → Prompt/output upgrades for lists, exact numbers, constraints, and distinctions**.

Backlog detail: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 4. Prompt and output-structure upgrades for specificity preservation**.

Implementation context:
- observer/reflector prompt text is in `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- XML-ish parsing and LLM call wiring are in `src/agents.ts`
- final injected layout is built in `src/engine.ts`
- current behavior already asks for specifics, but the practical gap is stricter preservation of structure and exactness under long-session compression

What this epic should establish:
- stronger preservation of lists, counts, exact numbers, paths, commands, constraints, rejected alternatives, and distinguishing attributes
- reflector behavior that keeps that structure during consolidation instead of flattening it
- regression tests that catch specificity loss

Useful references:
- backlog doc section 4 plus linked Mastra refs (`observer-agent.ts`, `reflector-agent.ts`, `long-session.test.ts`)
- local unit/integration tests for prompt parsing and cycle behavior

This should improve extraction fidelity without overfitting to one exact output phrasing.
title: Upgrade OM prompts and output structure for specificity preservation
